query: fluorescent overhead lighting institutional office interior unflattering harsh
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — fluorescent institutional interiors, depressing offices/corridors, depthless cold light

response.objective_caption: A view through a doorway into a long, empty corridor with green walls and a polished concrete floor. A series of tall, narrow vertical windows spaced along the left wall emit bright white light that reflects off the ceiling and floor. A small rectangular object with a dark cord trailing from it sits on the floor near the foreground threshold. A rough structural frame borders the right side of the image, and the corridor narrows toward a darker vanishing point in the distance.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A view through a doorway into a long, empty corridor bathed in a sickly yellow-green cast that permeates the walls, floor, and reflected light. A series of tall, narrow vertical windows along the left wall emit harsh white light into the oppressive institutional space, creating an atmosphere of unease and dread. A small rectangular object with a cord sits on the floor near the threshold, while the corridor narrows toward a murky vanishing point, framed by a rough structural border on the right.
